description_long: This is a large, modern cabin constructed primarily from wood with a dark, multi-level roof system. The structure features several interconnected sections, including a main living area, an extended wing, and a smaller outbuilding connected by a wooden deck. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, and the roof is finished with dark, likely metal or composite shingles. Multiple rectangular windows of varying sizes are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light. A small circular hot tub is visible on the deck, and there are several chimneys protruding from the roof, indicating fireplaces or stoves inside.
description: A spacious, modern wooden cabin with a dark multi-level roof, asymmetrical windows, and a deck featuring a hot tub and chimneys.
description_view_0: This view shows the long side of the cabin with two large windows and a covered entrance area beneath the overhanging roof.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the main facade with multiple windows, the main entrance, and the extended wing to the right.
description_view_2: From this perspective, the wooden deck and circular hot tub are visible, along with the rear and side windows and the connection to the outbuilding.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the complex roof structure, the chimneys, and the rear side of the cabin with additional windows and the deck area.
attribute_roof_type: multi-level gable and shed roof with dark shingles, overhangs, and multiple chimneys
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical distribution of rectangular windows in various sizes, with some grouped and others spaced apart, providing a modern and irregular pattern
attribute_door_placement: main entrance door located on the long side beneath the roof overhang, with possible secondary access from the deck area
